headline: What Analyst Projections for Key Metrics Reveal About PulteGroup (PHM) Q1 Earnings
summary: Besides Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimates for PulteGroup (PHM), review projections for some of its key metrics to gain a deeper understanding of how the company might have fared during the quarter ended March 2026.
